backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Note type (classLevel, subject, topic, content) with CRUD operations and query methods to retrieve notes by class, subject, or all notes; includes seed data for Mathematics, Science, English, Social Studies, and Hindi across classes 6-12.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: home page with class navigation, subjects listing page, notes viewer page, and educational theme design with warm colors.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing routing, layout, pages, components, hooks, and styling with warm academic color palette.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space with neutral grayscale values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Educational Notes App.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root, index, class, and notes routes with Layout wrapper component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component with sticky header showing EduNotes branding with BookOpen icon, main content outlet, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/NoteCard.tsx: Expandable card component displaying note topic with notebook icon and collapsible content area toggled by chevron button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication managing login state, identity, and AuthClient with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks (useGetAllNotes, useGetNotesByClass, useGetNotesBySubject) for fetching notes from backend actor with proper enablement conditions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom warm academic color palette (earth tones, terracotta, golden yellow) for light and dark modes, plus enhanced typography for reading study material.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a hero banner and grid of class level cards (6-12) for navigation to subject pages.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Displays filtered list of notes for a specific class and subject combination with breadcrumb navigation and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Shows available subjects for a selected class level with note counts, using icons and cards for navigation to notes pages.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with custom OKLCH color system, animations, typography plugin, and container queries support.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking educational notes app features, pending backend requirements (data model, API methods, seeding), and warm academic design theme implementation status.
